name: GoDubai Real Estate AI Sales Agent

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const history = d.messageHistory || [];
const userMsg = d.userMessage || '';
const clientConfig = d.clientConfig || {};

const histLines = history
  .filter(function(m) { return !(m.role === 'user' && m.content === userMsg); })
  .map(function(m) { return (m.role === 'user' ? 'Customer: ' : 'Assistant: ') + m.content; })
  .join('\n');

const system = 'You are a precise real estate CRM extraction engine. Return one valid JSON object only. No markdown. No commentary.';
const prompt = 'Extract structured lead data for this real estate sales demo.\n\n'
  + 'CLIENT CONTEXT:\n'
  + 'Company: ' + (clientConfig.companyName || 'GoDubai Portal') + '\n'
  + 'Market: ' + (clientConfig.market || 'Dubai & UAE') + '\n'
  + 'Service Areas: ' + ((clientConfig.serviceAreas || []).join(', ')) + '\n\n'
  + 'Conversation history:\n' + (histLines || '(start of conversation)')
  + '\n\nLatest customer message: ' + userMsg + '\n\n'
  + 'Previously captured qualifications: ' + JSON.stringify(d.currentLead || {}) + '\n'
  + 'Previously captured contact details: ' + JSON.stringify(d.currentLeadCapture || {}) + '\n\n'
  + 'Return ONLY this JSON shape. Use null for unknown scalar values and empty string for unknown contact text fields:\n'
  + '{\n'
  + '  "intent": "buy" | "rent" | "sell" | "invest" | null,\n'
  + '  "city": string | null,\n'
  + '  "area": string | null,\n'
  + '  "budget_max": number | null,\n'
  + '  "bedrooms_min": number | null,\n'
  + '  "timeline": string | null,\n'
  + '  "deal_type": "sale" | "rent" | null,\n'
  + '  "needs_property_search": boolean,\n'
  + '  "latest_message_action": "new_search" | "refine_search" | "property_followup" | "booking_request" | "contact_details_provided" | "preferred_time_provided" | "seller_request" | "broker_leads_request" | "general_question" | "out_of_scope" | "unclear",\n'
  + '  "customer_name": string,\n'
  + '  "phone": string,\n'
  + '  "email": string,\n'
  + '  "requested_action": "more_details" | "schedule_viewing" | "speak_to_agent" | "valuation_request" | "shortlist_request" | "broker_leads_request" | "general_question" | "",\n'
  + '  "selected_property_reference": string,\n'
  + '  "preferred_date_time": string,\n'
  + '  "search_reason": string\n'
  + '}\n\n'
  + 'EXTRACTION RULES:\n'
  + '1. deal_type is sale for buy/invest/off-plan purchase, rent for rent.\n'
  + '2. needs_property_search = true only when enough criteria exist for a useful search and latest action is new_search/refine_search.\n'
  + '3. Dubai off-plan, investment plan, Golden Visa property search, shortlist, project comparison, and recommendations count as invest or buy depending on wording.\n'
  + '4. Broker lead/subscription questions are broker_leads_request and MUST NOT trigger property search. If the visitor says broker, buyer leads, seller leads, verified leads, lead subscription, or lead access, classify latest_message_action=broker_leads_request, requested_action=broker_leads_request, needs_property_search=false.\n'
  + '5. If visitor asks to view/visit/book/call/schedule, requested_action=schedule_viewing or speak_to_agent as appropriate.\n'
  + '6. If visitor asks for a shortlist or project recommendations, requested_action=shortlist_request.\n'
  + '7. If visitor provides name, phone, WhatsApp, or email, latest_message_action=contact_details_provided.\n'
  + '8. If visitor asks for legal, tax, mortgage, Golden Visa approval, or guaranteed ROI advice, classify as general_question.\n'
  + '9. Preserve previously captured values unless the latest message clearly changes them.';

const reqBody = {
  model: 'gpt-5.4-mini',
  reasoning: { effort: 'none' },
  max_output_tokens: 500,
  text: { format: { type: 'json_object' } },
  input: [
    { role: 'system', content: system },
    { role: 'user', content: prompt }
  ]
};

return {
  openaiRequestBody: JSON.stringify(reqBody),
  sessionId: d.sessionId, userMessage: d.userMessage, messageHistory: d.messageHistory,
  currentLead: d.currentLead, currentLeadCapture: d.currentLeadCapture, timestamp: d.timestamp,
  clientId: d.clientId, clientConfig: d.clientConfig
};

nodes.name: OpenAI Extract Criteria
nodes.notes: Uses gpt-5.4-mini via OpenAI Responses API for fast structured lead extraction.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const history = d.messageHistory || [];
const props = d.properties || [];
const clientConfig = d.clientConfig || { companyName: 'GoDubai Portal', assistantName: 'Sofia', market: 'Dubai & UAE', websiteUrl: 'https://www.godubai.estate/', serviceAreas: ['Dubai', 'UAE', 'Business Bay', 'Dubai South', 'Dubai Design District (D3)', 'Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC)', 'Dubailand', 'Yas Island'], companyStrengths: ['verified Dubai and UAE off-plan project listings', 'personalized Dubai investment plan flow', 'support for brokers, investors, and property buyers', 'human-verified exclusive real estate leads for brokers', 'fast support and sales follow-up'] };
const companyContext = 'COMPANY CONTEXT:
' + 'Company Name: ' + clientConfig.companyName + '
' + 'Market: ' + clientConfig.market + '
' + 'Website: ' + clientConfig.websiteUrl + '
' + 'Service Areas: ' + (clientConfig.serviceAreas || []).join(', ') + '
' + 'Company Strengths: ' + (clientConfig.companyStrengths || []).join(', ');
const SYSTEM = 'You are ' + clientConfig.assistantName + ', the AI real estate sales consultant for ' + clientConfig.companyName + '.

' + companyContext + '

SALES MISSION:
- Act like a sharp, warm, consultative real estate sales assistant.
- Qualify the visitor naturally: goal, location, property type, budget, timeline, and contact readiness.
- Recommend the first property in PROPERTY CONTEXT as the strongest factual match. The visible property cards are shown in exactly that order. Explain why it fits using exact listing facts.
- Guide serious visitors toward the next step: viewing, project shortlist, valuation request, broker lead subscription discussion, or speaking with the team.
- Use confident but honest language. Make the next step feel easy and valuable.

STRICT RULES:
- English only unless the customer writes in another language; then mirror their language.
- Keep replies concise: 2 short paragraphs max, then one clear question or next step.
- Ask maximum 2 questions per message.
- Persuade only with facts from PROPERTY CONTEXT, COMPANY CONTEXT, or conversation history.
- If asked whether you are AI, say: I am an AI property assistant for ' + clientConfig.companyName + ', here to help qualify your needs and connect you with the team.
- If the visitor shows serious intent, ask for name and phone/email/WhatsApp if missing.
- Do not claim a viewing, shortlist, ROI, Golden Visa, price, availability, or call is confirmed until the team confirms it.
- NEVER invent property details, company claims, market data, urgency, legal/tax/mortgage/Golden Visa approval advice, or guaranteed returns.
' + (true ? '- ONLY recommend properties that appear in PROPERTY CONTEXT. If no matches were found, suggest a realistic adjustment.
' : '- No fresh property search has run. Ask qualifying questions or answer follow-up using last shown properties only.
') + '- For investment language, say may fit, worth reviewing, or could be suitable instead of guarantees.';
function fmtProp(p) { const listingCurrency = p.currency || 'AED'; const price = p.deal_type === 'rent' ? listingCurrency + ' ' + (p.price_per_month || 0) + '/month' : listingCurrency + ' ' + (p.price || 0).toLocaleString('en-US'); return '[' + p.property_id + '] ' + p.title + '
Location: ' + p.area + ', ' + p.city + ' | Price: ' + price + '
Bedrooms: ' + p.bedrooms + ' | Size: ' + p.size_sqm + 'm2' + (p.investment_yield_pct ? ' | Yield: ' + p.investment_yield_pct + '%' : '') + '
Summary: ' + String(p.description || '').slice(0, 180); }
const propContext = props.length > 0 ? '[PROPERTY CONTEXT - START]
Found matching properties in the database:

' + props.map(fmtProp).join('

---

') + '
[PROPERTY CONTEXT - END]

The first property listed below is also the first visible property card. Recommend that first property first, then mention the others only as alternatives. Use only the facts above.' : '[PROPERTY CONTEXT - START]
No properties matched the customer criteria.
[PROPERTY CONTEXT - END]

Be honest that no match was found. Suggest adjusting budget, property type, bedrooms, or location. Do NOT invent properties.';
const histWithoutLast = history.length > 0 ? history.slice(0, -1) : [];
const budgetCurrencyNote = d.criteria && d.criteria.budget_currency ? '
Customer budget currency detected: ' + d.criteria.budget_currency + '. Listing prices remain in each listing currency. If customer used USD, do not silently relabel it as AED; clarify that listings are priced in AED and ask whether they want the shortlist converted/compared.
' : '';
const messages = histWithoutLast.concat([{ role: 'user', content: d.userMessage + budgetCurrencyNote + '

' + propContext }]);
const reqBody = { model: 'gpt-5.4-mini', reasoning: { effort: 'low' }, max_output_tokens: 500, instructions: SYSTEM, input: messages.map(function(m) { return { role: m.role, content: m.content }; }) };
return { openaiRequestBody: JSON.stringify(reqBody), properties: d.properties, propertiesFound: d.propertiesFound, propertyCount: d.propertyCount, criteria: d.criteria, leadCapture: d.leadCapture, sessionId: d.sessionId, userMessage: d.userMessage, messageHistory: d.messageHistory, currentLead: d.currentLead, currentLeadCapture: d.currentLeadCapture, timestamp: d.timestamp, clientId: d.clientId, clientConfig: d.clientConfig };

nodes.name: OpenAI Generate Reply
nodes.notes: Uses gpt-5.4-mini via OpenAI Responses API for faster sales replies.
